productDisplayName: Lotto Men's BasketBall Black Red Shoe
description: An excellent combination of superior technology and style, the Basket shoes from lotto keep your feet dry and comfortable all day. Slip into these shoes during your training sessions or chill in them while out with your friends.Upper Synthetic and perforated upper for extended durability and to keep the feet fresh and dry all day Synthetic lace-up system for snug Fit Cushioned collar and padded tongue for extremely comfortable grip on the foot High ankle support to enable sprinting while playing Extended rubber outsole embedded onto the toe box for superior sock absorption Padded sockliner for snug fit and comfort grip Midsole EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel and high shock absorption Outsole Carbon rubber outsole with wired pattern for enhanced grip on any terrain Scoop below  the arch to provide superior traction shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
